articles.title: AND SO CAN YOU
articles.summary: Anyscale [5] is the company behind the open-source framework called Ray, used by the world’s leading AI teams.

articles.title: NVIDIA IS LAUNCHING A NEW MUST-HAVE AI-CHIP
articles.summary: Nvidia is launching the HGX H200, an advanced AI chip with significantly more memory bandwidth and capacity than its predecessor, the H100. Availability remains uncertain as Nvidia works with partners for its 2024 release.

articles.title: OPENAI REVEALS NEW DETAILS ABOUT ITS AI DEVELOPMENT ROADMAP AND FUNDRAISING PLANS
articles.summary: OpenAI is working on GPT-5 and seeking additional funding from Microsoft Corp. for its development.

articles.title: XBOX PARTNERS WITH INWORLD AI TO BUILD GENERATIVE AI TOOLS FOR GAME DEVELOPMENT
articles.summary: Xbox and Inworld AI are collaborating to create AI-powered tools to help enrich the narrative and character creation elements in game development. The partnership will develop an AI design copilot to assist game designers and an AI character runtime engine for an immersive gaming experience. They anticipate these tools will foster limitless creativity, enhance immersion, and expedite game production.

articles.title: GENERALIZED BIOMOLECULAR MODELING AND DESIGN WITH ROSETTAFOLD ALL-ATOM
articles.summary: Advances in AI, including AlphaFold, have significantly increased the rate of progress in science. This study presents RoseTTAFold All-Atom, a neural network that can model a wide range of molecules beyond proteins including drugs, vitamins, DNA, and sugars. The authors validate their architecture by fine-tuning it into a diffusion model and experimentally validating new-to-nature molecules designed from minimal prompts across many applications.

articles.title: TRAINING LANGUAGE MODELS ON LOW RESOURCE LANGUAGES
articles.summary: This paper introduces FinGPT, a language model trained on Finnish. The researchers who created it found that data repetition with some tricks produced extremely smooth loss curves. This may serve as an easy fix for underrepresented languages on the internet.

articles.title: A WATERMARKING METHOD FOR PROTECTING VISION-LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: VLPMarker, a new watermarking method, protects Embedding as a Service Vision-Language Pre-Trained Models from extraction attacks.

articles.title: MENDABLE: CREATE ‘CHAT WITH YOUR DATA’ APPS WITH ONE LINE OF CODE
articles.summary: Mendable provides AI chat search [13] for any use case — documentation, support, product copilots, and more. It’s as fast and simple as _npm install @mendable/search_ [13]. ✔️ Trusted by Snap, MongoDB, Worldline

articles.title: Start building with the Mendable API and pre-built components
OPENGPTS
articles.summary: An open-source project building upon LangChain, LangServe, and LangSmith that offers customizable language models, prompts, tools, vector databases, retrieval algorithms, and chat history databases. It features a sandbox environment, custom actions, and analytics for enhanced user control similar to OpenAI's GPTs.

articles.title: ENHANCEMENTS TO LLAMA WITH TAMIL TOKENS
articles.summary: The enhanced LLaMA model now includes 16,000 Tamil tokens, leveraging the LoRA methodology for efficient training. This update, along with new Tamil versions of Alpaca and OpenOrca datasets, has notably improved Tamil text processing, paving the way for future advancements in Indian language AI.

articles.title: AUTONOMOUS DRIVING WITH VISUAL LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: This report evaluates GPT-4V for autonomous driving, focusing on its capabilities in scene understanding, decision-making, and real-time responses.

articles.title: NVIDIA AND MIT RESEARCHERS IMPROVE HOW HARDWARE HANDLES SPARSITY
articles.summary: Sparse tensors occur when some values of the neural network are zeros. These values can efficiently be skipped. Researchers developed a way to quickly find when values are zero and overload hardware to fit more non-zero values onto a chip at a time.

articles.title: AI AND OPEN SOURCE IN 2023
articles.summary: A comprehensive review of the major developments in the AI research, industry, and open-source space that happened in 2023.

articles.title: HOW AN INVESTOR MIGHT CATEGORIZE YOUR AI STARTUP
[KICKSTARTER] A CHATGPT-POWERED SMART NOTEBOOK

articles.title: XNote for 37% off
OPENAI’S SIX-MEMBER BOARD WILL DECIDE “WHEN WE’VE ATTAINED AGI”
articles.summary: OpenAI's six-member board will decide when AGI is achieved, potentially impacting its commercial relationship with Microsoft.

articles.title: GIANT AI PLATFORM INTRODUCES ‘BOUNTIES’ FOR DEEPFAKES OF REAL PEOPLE
articles.summary: Civitai, an AI model sharing platform, has introduced a controversial "bounties" feature, allowing users to request and monetize the creation of AI-generated images.
